title: Minimum Weighted Subgraph With The Required Paths
description: In a directed weighted graph, find the minimum total weight of an edge subset containing paths from both sources to dest, or -1. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: n: int, edges: list[list[int]], src1: int, src2: int, dest: int. 2 <= n <= 100000; at most 100000 directed 0-indexed weighted edges; positive weights <= 100000; sources and destination are distinct.
output_contract: Return long using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
